# Vantx

> Managed performance engineering, observability, and fractional SRE at startup speed.

Vantx is the external Performance and SRE team for scaling tech companies. We deliver monitoring, load testing, observability, and reliability practices as a managed subscription — so engineering teams focus on shipping, not firefighting.

## Services

### Performance as a Service — $5,995/month
Continuous load testing, synthetic monitoring 24/7, and monthly capacity planning. Know your limits before your users do.
- Measured capacity baseline (Max TPS, breakpoint, p95)
- Uptime + synthetic monitoring 24/7
- Monthly load test + capacity planning report
- Weekly Lighthouse CI scans (Core Web Vitals trending)
- Real-time Grafana dashboards
- Weekly report via Slack, monthly PDF report
- Entry option: Performance Checkup — $2,995 one-time (5-day assessment)

URL: https://vantx.io/services/performance.html

### Observability as a Service
Diagnose any incident in 30 seconds. Alerts your team trusts, dashboards that answer questions, telemetry bill reduced 30–50%.
- OpenTelemetry instrumentation (up to 5 services)
- Business-aligned SLOs + error budget tracking
- 10–15 Grafana dashboards (RED + USE methodology)
- Monthly alert review + service onboarding
- Telemetry cost optimization (cardinality analysis, log sampling)
- Quarterly 2h team workshop

URL: https://vantx.io/services/observability.html

### Fractional SRE
Senior SRE embedded in your team. Incident command, post-mortems, reliability roadmap — $150K expertise at a flat monthly rate.
- Embedded in your workflow (Slack, PR reviews, standups)
- Architecture review + reliability roadmap (weeks 1–2)
- Incident command + structured post-mortems
- P1 escalation: 15 min response
- SLO program definition + monthly reviews

URL: https://vantx.io/services/fractional-sre.html

### Fractional QA Tech Lead
Test strategy, automation framework, CI/CD gates, and mentoring.
- Test coverage audit + strategy document (week 1)
- Automation framework (Playwright / Cypress / Selenium)
- CI/CD integration with PR-level test gates
- Contract testing (Pact) + visual regression
- Pair programming, code reviews, workshops

URL: https://vantx.io/services/qa-tech-lead.html

## Model

Inspired by DesignJoy: flat monthly subscription, no hourly tracking, no surprise invoices. Pause or cancel anytime. Month-to-month, no lock-in, no exit fees. 100% async by default (Slack, Loom, PDF reports). 100% open-source stack — k6, Grafana, OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, Playwright. Everything we build is yours.

## Target Audience

CTOs and engineering managers at scaling companies (Series A–C, 50–500 employees) who lack dedicated performance engineering, SRE, or observability talent. Primarily in Latin America, Spain, and the United States.

## Tech Stack

k6 (load testing), Grafana (dashboards), OpenTelemetry (instrumentation), Prometheus (metrics), Playwright (synthetic monitoring + E2E), Lighthouse CI (web performance).

## Contact

- Website: https://vantx.io
- Email: hello@vantx.io
- Book a call: https://calendly.com/hello-vantx/15min
